title: hypoporum interruptum
intro: Hypoporum interruptum, commonly known as the Interrupted Hypoporum, is a type of lichenized fungus that belongs to the family Collemataceae. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and protect cells from damage. The therapeutic actions of Hypoporum interruptum are attributed to its bioactive constituents, including usnic acid, which has been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Additionally, the plant's bioactive compounds, such as polysaccharides and phenolic acids, may also contribute to its therapeutic effects, making it a subject of interest for further research.
intro_study: According to "International journal of leprosy and other mycobacterial diseases : official organ of the International Leprosy Association", hypoporum interruptum (also known as oil of hydnocarpus) has been found to have a positive effect in wound healing, increasing the strength of scar tissue and collagen tissue, and promoting a significant increase in body weight.
